title: invoice
description: An invoice record extracted from CapWeb mail/attachments. Leave a field null rather than guess; low-confidence records are routed to human review, not reconciliation.

id.description: stable invoice id (invoice number, or Gmail message id + index)

client.description: client/payee name; reconciliation matches on this + period

period.description: billing period key; must match the timesheet's period string exactly

hours.description: billed hours; compared exactly against the timesheet

amount.description: billed amount; compared EXACTLY (no tolerance) against the timesheet amount

due_date.description: ISO date the invoice is due; required to appear on the proposed payment schedule

payee.description: who to pay; defaults to client when absent

confidence.description: 0-1 extraction confidence; below threshold => human review, not reconcile
